rawFiles.name: wikidata-rail-station-candidates-2026-07-08.json
rawFiles.notes: Generated by a Wikidata SPARQL query against reviewed Syria railway station items in the local data-automation output directory.

transforms: Query Wikidata for reviewed Syria railway station items with coordinates.
Accept exact matches to existing GeoNames rail terminals when names and coordinates are compatible.
Add selected prominent city railway station records when no canonical station record exists and the item has a clear public railway-station identity.
Attach reviewed OpenSyria Data Geography locality links for accepted station records.
Keep operational status unknown and do not import live service or route availability.
reviewNotes: Imported 3 new public railway station records from Wikidata: Aleppo railway station (Q15179152), Homs railway station (Q64577287), and Qamishli train station (Q70732360). Enriched 3 existing GeoNames rail terminal records with Wikidata identifiers: Damascus Hejaz railway station (Q5701244), Qadam railway station (Q139821846), and Latakia railway station (Q139821599). Held Q12239402 because the English label is missing despite a likely Khabab coordinate match; held Q12239406 because it appears to describe Baniyas railway/goods station but needs independent review before adding a new facility.
